title: Center of Nowhere
overview: College couple Lucas Aragon and his girlfriend Sarah White venture into the New Mexican woods looking for the mythical Chupacabra. Their first night inspires them to look deeper for answers. Motivated and eager for adventure, the two head out one last night. What follows is a night of terror.
